input.narrative: Alcaraz holds a clear surface advantage and beat Sinner in their last clay meeting at Madrid 2024. Sinner's hard-court win at Indian Wells flips on clay where Alcaraz's career numbers are strongest. The model probability around 0.62 lines up with this read.
